outbound.label: Outbound
outbound.detail: Wed 25 Dec · 4:30 PM → 6:00 PM · BG373 · Biman Bangladesh Airlines · Boeing 737-800 · Economy-Y(B)

return.label: Return
return.detail: Mon 30 Dec · 12:35 PM → 2:15 PM · BG372 · Biman Bangladesh Airlines · Boeing 737-800 · Economy-Y(H)

acts.tx: Depart Dhaka DAC Terminal 2 — BG373, Biman Bangladesh Airlines. Boeing 737-800. 1h 45m.
Arrive Tribhuvan International Airport (KTM), Terminal 1. Clear immigration + bags. Tourist visa on arrival: USD 30/person (15 days).
Taxi: KTM airport → Flock Kathmandu, Paknajol. ~20 min, NPR 700–900. Fixed-price prepaid taxis at the airport are safest.
Check in: Flock Kathmandu, Paknajol (near Thamel). Check-in from 1:00 PM — late arrival fine.
Christmas dinner in Thamel — 5-min walk from hotel. Rooftop restaurants: dal bhat, momo, or wood-fired pizza. NPR 500–800/person.
Thamel Christmas night — the backpacker district is alive with live music, fairy lights, and rooftop bars. Tom & Jerry's or the Purple Haze for live Nepali rock.

Swayambhunath (Monkey Temple) — just 15 min walk from Flock Kathmandu. Climb 365 steps to the hilltop stupa for sunrise over the Kathmandu Valley. NPR 200/person. Hundreds of monkeys; all-seeing Buddha eyes on the spire.
Breakfast back in Thamel — Himalayan Java coffee or OR2K café. Eggs benedict, granola, fresh juice. NPR 400–600/person.
Taxi: Thamel → Pashupatinath Temple. ~15 min, NPR 300–400.

Pashupatinath Temple — the most sacred Hindu site in Nepal, on the banks of the Bagmati River. SAARC entry NPR 100/person. Ghats, sadhus in saffron robes, cremation rituals visible from across the river. Deeply moving.

Boudhanath Stupa — 10-min walk from Pashupatinath. One of the largest stupas in the world; UNESCO site. NPR 400/person. Tibetan monasteries surround it; prayer flags, butter-lamp offerings, monks circumambulating. ~1.5 hrs.
Lunch at a Tibetan restaurant around Boudhanath — thukpa (noodle soup), shapta (stir-fried beef), butter tea. NPR 400–600/person.
Taxi: Boudhanath → Kathmandu Durbar Square. ~20 min, NPR 400.
Kathmandu Durbar Square — ancient royal palace complex with Kumari Ghar (living goddess), Taleju Temple, and Hanuman Dhoka. NPR 1,000/person (full heritage zone pass). ~1.5 hrs.
Thamel evening shopping — thangka paintings, pashmina shawls, prayer bowls, trekking gear. Good-natured bargaining expected.
Dinner: Nepali thali at Thakali Kitchen or grilled buff momos at a local stall. NPR 400–700/person.
Early breakfast at hotel. Check out of Flock Kathmandu by 11:00 AM.

Private car: Kathmandu → Pokhara via Prithvi Highway. ~200 km, 6–7 hrs. The road winds through river gorges (Trishuli), terraced hillsides, and mountain valleys — a scenic drive in itself. NPR 12,000–15,000 total (one way).
Roadside stop at Mugling or Abu Khaireni — famous for fresh fish curry and chicken. NPR 300–500/person.
Arrive Pokhara. Check in: Hotel Middle Path & Spa, Lakeside. Check-in from 12:00 PM.
Phewa Lake waterfront — stroll the Lakeside promenade as the Annapurna range turns golden at dusk. Free. Rent a rowboat: NPR 400–600/hour.
Dinner at Lakeside — Moondance Restaurant or Busy Bee Café. Steaks, pasta, Nepali BBQ. NPR 600–900/person.
Taxi: hotel → Sarangkot Hill. ~20 min, NPR 500. Arrive before sunrise.
Sarangkot Sunrise — watch the sun rise behind Machhapuchhre (Fish Tail), Annapurna I, II, and IV turn pink above the clouds. One of the finest Himalayan panoramas in Nepal. NPR 100/person.

Sky Paragliding from Sarangkot — 30-min tandem glide from 1,600 m over Phewa Lake and the Pokhara Valley with the Annapurna range as the backdrop. NPR 8,000–9,000/person. GoPro video package available. Best thermals in the morning.
Transfer back to Lakeside after landing (paragliding ends near Phewa Lake shore). NPR 200.
Celebratory brunch at a Lakeside café. Pancakes, eggs, fresh lassi. NPR 400–600/person.
Phewa Lake boating — rowboat to Tal Barahi Temple (island shrine in the middle of the lake). NPR 600/hour. Crystal clear reflections of the Annapurna range on calm mornings.
Davis Falls (Patale Chhango) — the Pardi Khola river disappears underground in a dramatic cascade. NPR 50/person. Adjacent Gupteshwor Mahadev Cave: NPR 100/person — stalactites and a Shiva shrine.
World Peace Pagoda — white Japanese stupa on a hilltop above the southern shore of Phewa Lake. Free (NPR 100 boat across lake + 30-min hike). 360° views: lake below, Himalayas above.
Dinner at Lakeside — fresh Phewa trout with garlic butter, a Pokhara speciality. NPR 700–1,000/person.
Lakeside bars — Club Amsterdam, Busy Bee. Live Nepali folk music in the evenings.
Last morning on Phewa Lake — early row on the glassy water before the tourist crowds. Optional: Begnas Lake (30 min away, quieter). NPR 400/hour rowboat.
Final Pokhara breakfast + check out of Hotel Middle Path & Spa by 12:00 PM.
Private car: Pokhara → Kathmandu. ~7 hrs return via Prithvi Highway. NPR 12,000–15,000.
Lunch stop at Mugling — riverside dhabas. Dal bhat or mutton curry. NPR 300–500/person.
Arrive Kathmandu. Check in: Flock Kathmandu, Paknajol. Check-in from 1:00 PM.
Last dinner in Thamel — Fire & Ice Pizzeria (Kathmandu's best pizza) or a farewell Nepali thali. NPR 500–800/person.
Final Thamel shopping — last-minute pashminas, spices, and thankas for gifts. Pack tonight.
Quick breakfast at hotel. Check out of Flock Kathmandu by 11:00 AM.
Taxi: Flock Kathmandu → Tribhuvan International Airport (KTM). ~20 min, NPR 700–900.
Arrive KTM airport, Terminal 1. Check-in + immigration + security. Biman BG372.
Flight BG372 departs KTM — Biman Bangladesh Airlines. Boeing 737-800. 1h 25m.
Land Dhaka DAC Terminal 2 — Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport.

budget.note: DAC↔KTM BG373+BG372, Biman Bangladesh Airlines, for 2 passengers
Flock Kathmandu 3 nts + Hotel Middle Path & Spa 2 nts
~NPR 14,000 each way via Prithvi Highway. Includes driver and fuel.
30-min tandem flight from Sarangkot ~NPR 8,500/person. GoPro extra.
Visa 30 USD×2=7,980 · Swayambhunath 400 · Pashupatinath 200 · Boudhanath 800 · Durbar Square 2,000 · Sarangkot 200 · Davis Falls+Cave 300 · Peace Pagoda boat 200
Street momos + local thalis + Lakeside restaurants ~NPR 650/day for two
Airport taxis × 2 + Kathmandu city taxis + Pokhara tuk-tuks and boats
Includes flights, visa, paragliding. Excludes shopping.

notes.title: Visa
notes.text: Tourist visa on arrival at KTM airport: USD 30 for 15 days. Bring USD cash or card. Queues can be long — fill in the online form at immigration.gov.np before travel to save time.

notes.title: Currency
notes.text: 1 USD ≈ NPR 133 · 1 BDT ≈ NPR 1.21 (approx, Dec 2024). Indian Rupee (INR) is widely accepted at 1.6 NPR. ATMs in Thamel and Lakeside Pokhara dispense NPR. Carry cash for temples and street food.

notes.title: Paragliding
notes.text: Book with certified operators in Lakeside Pokhara (Blue Sky, Sunrise, or Avia Club). Minimum age 5; no upper weight limit in most cases. Morning flights (8–11 AM) give the clearest Himalayan views before afternoon clouds build.

notes.title: Road Trip
notes.text: KTM↔Pokhara via Prithvi Highway takes 6–7 hrs by private car. A scenic but winding mountain road — avoid night driving. Mugling and Abu Khaireni are popular midway food stops.

notes.title: Dress Code
notes.text: Remove footwear at all temple sites. At Pashupatinath, non-Hindus are restricted to the eastern bank. Dress modestly — cover shoulders and knees. Light layers for December; Pokhara mornings can be cold (8–12°C).
